name: 沈家洞房
description: 布置得极其繁复喜庆的洞房。满室挂满红色的绸缎丝带，巨大的拔步喜床铺着百子千孙被。儿臂粗的红烛燃烧着，流下殷红的烛泪。大红盖头被随意丢弃在床榻一角。极度的喜庆与人物间冰冷机械的互动形成强烈的讽刺感。
visual_reference: Interior of an ancient Chinese bridal chamber at night, large traditional marriage bed with embroidered quilts, red silk ribbons hanging from the ceiling, thick burning red candles dripping wax, a discarded red bridal veil on the bed, festive decor contrasting with a cold emotional atmosphere, dramatic lighting, highly detailed, 8k.
lighting: 摇曳的红烛光，在墙上投下巨大而扭曲的阴影
emotional_range: 从男主试图征服的羞辱，到被女主绝对冷漠反杀的挫败与难堪
